items.title: The Wizards and Lakers agreed on a trade today, with Washington adding Deandre Ayton and L.A. adding Jaden Hardy and two future second-round picks. Story written with @danwoikesports.bsky.social at @theathletic.com:
items.author: Josh Robbins
items.body_excerpt:
The Wizards and Lakers agreed on a trade today, with Washington adding Deandre Ayton and L.A. adding Jaden Hardy and two future second-round picks. Story written with @danwoikesports.bsky.social at @theathletic.com: 
www.nytimes.com/athletic/741...

media.title: Lakers agree to trade Deandre Ayton to Wizards for Jaden Hardy, picks: Sources
media.description: The Wizards view Ayton as a low-risk backup center who can start next to Alex Sarr if needed.

items.title: The Dorian Finney-Smith trade and the Deandre Ayton-Jaden Hardy trade were our 28th and 29th trades agreed to this offseason.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Dorian Finney-Smith trade and the Deandre Ayton-Jaden Hardy trade were our 28th and 29th trades agreed to this offseason.

Some of these deals are probably going to end up getting tied together in multi-team deals, but we'll end up in excess of 20 trades easily.

items.title: Just in: The Los Angeles Lakers are trading Deandre Ayton to the Washington Wizards for Jaden Hardy and two Wizards second-round picks in 2031 and 2032, sources tell ESPN.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: Just in: The Los Angeles Lakers are trading Deandre Ayton to the Washington Wizards for Jaden Hardy and two Wizards second-round picks in 2031 and 2032, sources tell ESPN.
